description: The inventory system flags a pallet of raw material that is due to expire in 60 days. The planner must ensure it is used before it expires.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the expiring inventory alert and identify the material and batch number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the specific pallet at risk.

nodes.task_description: Check the production schedule to find the next planned batch that uses this material.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a suitable production order scheduled in 3 weeks.

nodes.task_description: Allocate this specific batch of material to that upcoming production order to ensure it follows FIFO/FEFO rules.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reserves the expiring pallet for the designated production order.
